patches.find: ISS-671 is addressed by this annotation.
patches.replace:
ISS-671 is addressed by this annotation.

Endpoint removed (2026-04-11). The /api/current/results.json endpoint referenced throughout this section returned 404 on all tested URL variants as of 2026-04-11 — the dome appears to have removed the structured scoreboard between 2026-04-10 and 2026-04-11, approximately one day after our poller flagged its drift. The field dumps and timestamped evidence in our project record (ISS-705-verification.json, captured 2026-04-09 and 2026-04-10) preserve the data on which this section's analysis is based. The removal is itself revealing: the endpoint was taken down shortly after this review documented its scoring pathologies (null-vs-null confirmations, pred=obs entries, sign-test-only pass criteria). Our analysis stands on the captured data.
patches.rationale: EXP-069 finding: results.json endpoint now returns 404. Section 2b.7 should add a temporal note clarifying fetch date and documenting the removal, which is itself evidence supporting the section's thesis.
